description: The National Development Fund of Iran (NDF; Sandoq-e Towse'e-ye Melli) is Iran's sovereign wealth fund, established in 2011 to replace the Oil Stabilization Fund. Its mandate is to convert a portion of oil and gas revenues into productive investment, preserve wealth for future generations, and reduce the government's dependence on hydrocarbon income. Funded primarily by revenues from the [Ministry of Petroleum](/orgs/ministry-of-petroleum), the NDF channels capital into development projects inside and outside Iran. [Mehdi Ghazanfari](/people/mehdi-ghazanfari), the former Minister of Industries, Mines and Business, subsequently served as its chairman.

sources.title: National Development Fund of Iran — Wikipedia
National Development Fund of Iran — Official Site

editorial_notes: Established 2011, replacing the Oil Stabilization Fund. Funded by oil/gas export revenues (currently 20% per the 6th development plan). Mehdi Ghazanfari chaired it after his ministerial tenure.
